name: INR-NPR Exchange Bot
description: Telegram bot for semi-automatic INR ⇄ NPR currency exchange.

ADMIN_IDS.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs for admins (e.g. 123456789,987654321)

SERVICE_FEE_PERCENTAGE.description: Service fee percentage charged per exchange

REFERRAL_BONUS_PERCENT.description: Bonus percentage credited to referrer on each approved exchange

IN_DOCKER.description: Set to 1 when running in a container so /restart exits cleanly
